news: CervoMed presented neflamapimod clinical program updates at LBD meeting including new MRI analyses from Phase 2b and finalized Phase 3 trial design for H2 2026.

changes.reason: New MRI analyses from Phase 2b trial provide additional supportive data strengthening the evidence package for neflamapimod in DLB
Finalized Phase 3 trial design and additional biomarker data reduce execution risk and strengthen confidence in the program
